problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: If Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
